featureName: BUG-073-005: Comment-aware PWA storage policy scanning
title: Served PWA storage scan flags policy comments as executable access
source: current-session unit revert-reverify + disposable-stack served-route E2E

createdViaParent.expansionReason: Active runtime exposes no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so bubbles.workflow (dispatched by bubbles.iterate) executes each phase owner's contract inline. implement is the committed c5ddf562 fix (a reusable lexical helper internal/testsupport/jssource/comments.go +89 plus its adversarial test +46, with the served-route E2E web_pwa_chat_e2e_test.go +4/-1 and the PWA storage guard assistant_storage_guard_test.go +6/-21 both migrated to jssource.WithoutComments); test/regression were RE-VERIFIED live this session — the comment-aware scanner revert-reverify (RED: disabling comment detection in comments.go makes TestWithoutComments_IgnoresPolicyCommentsAndRetainsExecutableAccess FAIL at comments_test.go:16 AND TestWebAssistantStorageGuard_TP_073_06 FAIL on the REAL web/pwa/assistant.js/wiki_lib.js/wiki_time.js policy comments at assistant_storage_guard_test.go:98, UNIT_RED_REVERT_EXIT=1; GREEN: byte-exact git checkout HEAD restore, UNIT_GREEN_RESTORE_EXIT=0) plus a live served-route E2E (isolated TestAssistantWebPWAChatE2E_...TP_073_09 PASS against the real /pwa/assistant.js, SERVED_E2E_EXIT=0; full assistant package 40 PASS with only 2 foreign buildvcs FAIL, DI-073-005-01); simplify/stabilize are bounded direct reviews; security/validate/audit carry prior operator-attested specialist provenance plus this session's guard-backed reconciliation (state-transition-guard PASS, artifact-lint exit 0).

executionHistory.summary: Root-cause fix committed in c5ddf562: a reusable lexical helper internal/testsupport/jssource/comments.go (+89) exposes WithoutComments, which removes JavaScript line/block comments while preserving single/double/template strings, escaped delimiters, and source length. internal/testsupport/jssource/comments_test.go (+46) adversarially proves policy comments are removed while the executable localStorage.getItem(bearer) is retained and strings/URLs/templates survive with a length invariant. The served-route E2E tests/e2e/assistant/web_pwa_chat_e2e_test.go (+4/-1) now scans executableJS := jssource.WithoutComments(js) instead of the raw served text, and the PWA unit storage guard web/pwa/tests/assistant_storage_guard_test.go (+6/-21) drops its local comment stripping and reuses the shared helper with the same forbidden-regex catalog + executable-access adversary. Test-support-only change; no production PWA JavaScript, auth/session/storage model, response contract, deployment, release-train, or secret surface touched. The forbidden-API set is unchanged; only lexical treatment is now consistent across both policy checks.

Current-session genuine re-verification (good-neighbor; no foreign stack evicted). Comment-aware scanner revert-reverify on the committed tree: RED — disabling comment detection inside WithoutComments (the pre-fix raw-source behavior) makes TestWithoutComments_IgnoresPolicyCommentsAndRetainsExecutableAccess FAIL (comments_test.go:16: comment token survived lexical removal) AND TestWebAssistantStorageGuard_TP_073_06 FAIL on the REAL web/pwa/assistant.js/wiki_lib.js/wiki_time.js policy comments (assistant_storage_guard_test.go:98), UNIT_RED_REVERT_EXIT=1; GREEN — byte-exact git checkout HEAD -- internal/testsupport/jssource/comments.go restores it and all four scanner/guard tests return PASS, UNIT_GREEN_RESTORE_EXIT=0. Live served-route E2E leg: ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-package assistant --go-run '^TestAssistantWebPWAChatE2E_ServedRouteHasComposerTranscriptAndResponseMarkup_TP_073_09$' -> PASS against the real served /pwa/assistant.js, SERVED_E2E_EXIT=0, clean teardown. Evidence in report.md 'Revert-Reverify' + 'Live Served-Route E2E'.

Current-session broader regression leg: ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-package assistant -> 40 PASS (including TestAssistantWebPWAChatE2E_...TP_073_09) in package order; every in-boundary scanner/served-route flow and neighboring assistant flow is GREEN. The only 2 failures are the SAME pre-existing foreign build-environment failure (TestIntentReplayE2E_* in intent_replay_test.go -> replay CLI go build fails with 'error obtaining VCS status: exit status 128 / Use -buildvcs=false', at :187/:224) in the spec-069 intent-replay subsystem, outside this change boundary, not caused by this change (working tree packet-only; only jssource + two test files), dispositioned DI-073-005-01 (G051/G095). PKG_E2E_EXIT=1 attributable ONLY to the foreign failures. Full Go units (FULL_GO_UNITS_EXIT=0) and Python units (708 passed, FULL_PY_UNITS_EXIT=0) GREEN. No product regression; no findings to route.

n/a with provenance. Bounded review: the fix extracts ONE reusable helper (jssource.WithoutComments) and migrates BOTH divergent scanners to it, REMOVING duplication (the PWA guard's local comment stripping, web/pwa/tests -21). No new type, abstraction, provider registry, indirection, or fallback introduced; design.md deliberately chose a small lexical state machine over ad hoc string replacement. Nothing to simplify — the change is a net reduction in scanner divergence.

n/a with provenance. Bounded stability review: test-support-only change; zero production-image / Compose / container-lifecycle / schema / NATS / migration changes; WithoutComments is a pure function (no state, no I/O). The disposable stack is torn down cleanly on exit in both live E2E legs (all containers/volumes/network Removed — good-neighbor). No shared-fixture coupling introduced beyond the pure helper, whose two consumers are declared in the Change Boundary.

executionHistory.note: Exact-candidate security review returned PASS for merge, build, and deploy.

Exact-candidate diagnostic returned PASS for fast-forward merge, build, and deploy while preserving explicit skips and nonterminal certification. This session's validate-owned reconciliation ran the governance guards against the reconciled packet (state-transition-guard PASS, failedGateIds []; artifact-lint exit 0) and stamps terminal certification only in the promote commit after the planning-truth commit (G088).

Exact-candidate source, test, and documentation consistency passed; delivery completion was blocked only by packet governance. This session's audit reconciliation (report.md '### Audit Evidence') verdict SHIP: the revert-reverify is a non-fabricated RED->GREEN proof, the change is isolated to the committed c5ddf562 + packet, no NO-DEFAULTS fallback was introduced, and the 2 broader-suite failures are foreign buildvcs (DI-073-005-01).

scopeSummary.title: Share executable-source inspection across unit and live E2E guards

Fix re-verified live this session (revert-reverify RED->GREEN + live served-route E2E GREEN); 2 broader-suite failures dispositioned DI-073-005-01 (G051/G095). Certified done by validate.

routing.reason: Governance reconciliation complete: certification.scopeProgress present (G056), all 8 bugfix-fastlane phases recorded with provenance (G022, Check 6B security/validate/audit specialist provenance intact), 19 DoD closed with inline evidence, scope 1 Done, completedScopes parity. Root cause (raw-source scan trips on policy comments) reproduced this session via the comment-aware scanner revert-reverify (RED: TestWithoutComments_... + TestWebAssistantStorageGuard_TP_073_06 FAIL on the REAL web/pwa/*.js policy comments; GREEN: byte-exact git checkout HEAD restore) and the fix proven live (served-route E2E GREEN SERVED_E2E_EXIT=0 against the real /pwa/assistant.js; full assistant package 40 PASS). The only 2 broader-suite failures are pre-existing foreign buildvcs failures in the spec-069 intent-replay subsystem, dispositioned DI-073-005-01 (G051/G095). Certified done by validate.
